chunks.text: THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI Present: Mr. Justice Adnan Iqbal Chaudhry Mr. Justice Muhammad Jaffer Raza C.P. No. D – 5812 of 2025 [Hazaz Trading SDN BHD versus FOP and others] Petitioner: Hazaz Trading SDN, BHD through Mr. Nisar Ahmed Khan Rind, Advocate. Respondents 1-2: Federation of Pakistan through Ms. Mehreen Ebrahim, DAG. Respondent 3: The Collector of Customs (Enforcement) through Sardar Zafar Hussain, Advocate. Date of hearing: 09-12-2025 Date of decision: 09-12-2025 O R D E R Adnan Iqbal Chaudhry J. – Sardar Zafar Hussain, Advocate, files Vakalatnama for Respondent No.3 and states that the Petitioner has already been granted a stay by the Customs Appellate Tribunal. That being so, the purpose of the petition stands served. Disposed of accordingly. JUDGE JUDGE SHABAN*
